Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

5.0/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Onyx Auto Detailing to get the job done right.

“After storing my 1963 Corvette in a Thunderbolt garage for 18 months, I feared the worst. Onyx not only removed all the mildew but restored the original white leather seats to like-new condition without compromising their authenticity. Their documentation helped me secure a higher insurance valuation too.”

Eleanor R. Classic Car Preservation
Mar 15, 2025

“When Hurricane Idalia threatened, I rushed my new F-150 to Onyx. Their flood prep treatments saved me when six inches of water entered my Wilmington Island garage. While neighbors dealt with corroded electronics and moldy carpets, my truck started right up with no issues. Worth every penny.”

Marcus T. Hurricane Prep Detailing
Jan 22, 2025

“Living on Jones Street with no driveway makes car care challenging. Onyx's mobile team transformed my MINI Cooper in the alley behind my home without disturbing my neighbors. They even worked around the sidewalk cafe tables and tourists. My leather seats have never looked better despite the constant humidity.”

Sophia L. Historic District Mobile Detail
Apr 3, 2025

“I have severe allergies and dreaded getting in my pollen-coated car every morning. Onyx's anti-static treatment cut my symptoms by at least half. My black Audi now stays clean-looking for weeks instead of hours after washing. The HVAC cleaning made the biggest difference - no more sneezing fits when I start the car.”

David K. Pollen Season Revival
Feb 18, 2025

“When selling my Mercedes GLE, the difference after Onyx's preparation was astounding. The dealership offered $4,000 more than initially quoted because every surface looked brand-new. They even cleaned the diamond-cut wheels so thoroughly the sales manager asked who did the work. My husband now insists on using them before every service visit.”

Isabella M. Luxury Dealership Preparation
May 9, 2025

“Between construction sites downtown and my kids' soccer practices, my Explorer was constantly filthy. The monthly maintenance plan keeps it looking respectable without spending hours cleaning. The technicians remember exactly which cup holder my daughter spilled smoothie in last time and always give it extra attention. Game changer.”

Nathan B. Daily Driver Maintenance
Mar 27, 2025
Onyx Auto Detailing

Trusted auto detailing professionals serving Savannah, GA and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.

555-aut-r93
